name: OCU P3 Interact
description: Validates the interaction engine: factory, linux/web/android/androidtv backends, verifier hook, and stress behaviour.

metadata._llm_driven_reason: Vision-driven test suite per HelixQA Constitution §1 (Fully Autonomous LLM-Driven QA): prose actions are interpreted by the vision model. Article XI §11.5 exemption.
metadata.author: vasic-digital

test_cases.name: factory-register-and-open
test_cases.expected_result: Custom factory registered under a test kind is discoverable via Kinds() and Open() returns a non-nil Interactor

test_cases.name: factory-unknown-kind-errors

steps.name: Run factory unknown kind error case

test_cases.expected_result: Open() returns a non-nil error containing the unregistered kind name

test_cases.name: factory-kinds-listing
test_cases.expected_result: Kinds() returns a sorted list that includes all registered kinds

test_cases.name: factory-concurrent-register-race

steps.name: Run factory concurrent register race check

test_cases.expected_result: Concurrent Register() and Open() calls produce no data races under -race

test_cases.name: linux-production-returns-err-not-wired
test_cases.expected_result: Linux Interactor.Click() returns ErrNotWired when no injector is wired (P3.5 deferred)

test_cases.name: linux-mock-all-methods
test_cases.expected_result: All 5 Interactor methods delegate to the injector in order with correct arguments

test_cases.name: linux-registered-as-kind
test_cases.expected_result: linux package init() registers 'linux' kind in the factory

test_cases.name: web-production-returns-err-not-wired
test_cases.expected_result: Web Interactor.Click() returns ErrNotWired when no CDP injector is wired (P3.5 deferred)

test_cases.name: web-mock-all-methods
test_cases.expected_result: All 5 Interactor methods delegate to the CDP injector in order

test_cases.name: web-registered-as-kind
test_cases.expected_result: web package init() registers 'web' kind in the factory

test_cases.name: android-both-kinds-registered
test_cases.expected_result: android package init() registers both 'android' and 'androidtv' kinds in the factory

test_cases.name: android-kind-distinguishes-phone-and-tv
test_cases.expected_result: Interactor.Kind() returns 'android' for phone and 'androidtv' for TV; factory routes them correctly

test_cases.name: verifier-noop-always-nil
test_cases.expected_result: NoOp.After() returns nil for any action string

test_cases.name: verifier-wrap-calls-after-correct-action

steps.name: Run Wrap calls-After with correct action test

test_cases.expected_result: Wrap() calls Verifier.After() with the correct action string ('click','type','scroll','key','drag') after each successful method

test_cases.name: verifier-inner-error-short-circuits
test_cases.expected_result: When the inner Interactor returns an error, Verifier.After() is NOT called and the error propagates

test_cases.name: stress-linux-100-concurrent
test_cases.expected_result: 100 concurrent linux Interactor constructions + Click calls complete with no data races under -race

test_cases.name: stress-web-100-concurrent
test_cases.expected_result: 100 concurrent web Interactor constructions + Click calls complete with no data races under -race

test_cases.name: stress-android-100-concurrent
test_cases.expected_result: 100 concurrent android+androidtv Interactor constructions + Click calls complete with no data races under -race

test_cases.name: stress-verifier-wrap-100-concurrent
test_cases.expected_result: 100 concurrent Wrap+Click calls complete with no data races under -race
